platforms.name: Web Widget
platforms.description: A drop-in JavaScript widget that embeds HeadyBot into any website with a single script tag. Fully customizable appearance, position (corner/inline/fullscreen), greeting messages, and behavior triggers. Works on React, Vue, plain HTML, Webflow, and any other web technology.

platforms.name: Slack
platforms.description: Install HeadyBot directly into your Slack workspace as a bot app. Responds in DMs, mentions, and dedicated channels. Maintains per-user conversation context, supports slash commands, and handles threaded conversations natively.

platforms.name: Discord
platforms.description: Deploy HeadyBot as a Discord bot in your server. Responds to mentions, DMs, and dedicated bot channels. Supports slash commands, button interactions, and embedded response cards with rich formatting.

platforms.name: Microsoft Teams
platforms.description: Install HeadyBot as a Microsoft Teams app available across your entire organization. Responds in personal chats, group conversations, and Teams channels. Supports Adaptive Cards, task modules, and SSO authentication via Azure AD.

platforms.name: WhatsApp
platforms.description: Deploy HeadyBot as a WhatsApp Business chatbot for customer-facing conversations. Reach users on the world's most popular messaging app with AI-powered support, lead qualification, and transactional messaging.

platforms.name: Telegram
platforms.description: Deploy HeadyBot as a Telegram bot for your community, customers, or internal team. Supports inline queries, custom keyboards, file handling, and group chat moderation alongside conversational AI capabilities.
